events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: American singer-songwriter Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'Hello' and 'Dancing on the Ceiling', was born on June 20, 1949.

angles.name: Lionel Richie's Big Day
angles.copy: He's a true legend of music, and today we're celebrating the one and only Lionel Richie as he turns 77! What's your favourite track from the Commodores frontman turned solo superstar?

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: American singer, songwriter, and actress Cyndi Lauper, famous for 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' and 'Time After Time', was born on June 22, 1953.

angles.name: Cyndi Lauper Celebration
angles.copy: Let's hear it for the iconic Cyndi Lauper, celebrating her 73rd birthday today! From 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' to Broadway, she's always brought incredible energy.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: British singer-songwriter George Michael, who rose to fame with Wham! and as a solo artist, was born on June 25, 1963, and passed away on December 25, 2016.

angles.name: Remembering George Michael
angles.copy: Today, we're remembering the incredible talent of George Michael, who would have been 63. His music continues to inspire and move generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: The 'King of Pop', Michael Jackson, tragically passed away on June 25, 2009, at the age of 50.

angles.name: Remembering the King of Pop
angles.copy: On this day, we reflect on the incredible legacy of Michael Jackson, who left us far too soon. His music and artistry remain unmatched.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: English musician, singer, songwriter, and actor Ringo Starr, best known as the drummer for The Beatles, was born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Ringo Starr
angles.copy: Peace and love! The legendary Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday today. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums or vocals?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: English musician, songwriter, and astrophysicist Sir Brian May, lead guitarist of Queen, was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Brian May's Big Day
angles.copy: Sending a huge happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! Guitar legend, astrophysicist, and Queen icon. What's your favourite May riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: English singer-songwriter Sir Mick Jagger, lead singer and co-founder of The Rolling Stones, was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Mick Jagger's Birthday
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? The Rolling Stones frontman is still rocking stages worldwide. What's your ultimate Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed the Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Happy Birthday MTV
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed the game forever! 'Video Killed The Radio Star' was the first video ever played. What was your favourite music video from back in the day?

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' Anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis's iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released in the UK on August 29, 1994, becoming a cornerstone of Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Day
angles.copy: Twenty-two years ago today, Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' dropped and changed the sound of the 90s. What's your standout track from this Britpop classic?

events.title: Anniversary of Woodstock Festival (1969)
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, on a dairy farm in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Remembered
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the legendary Woodstock Festival began. Three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation. Which iconic performance stands out for you?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: The 'King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we pay tribute to the one and only Elvis Presley. Forty-nine years since we lost The King, his music still reigns supreme.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur Shooting
events.blurb: On this day, we reflect on the events surrounding Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and later died on September 13.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur today. His impact on music and culture is undeniable, a voice that continues to resonate decades later.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix tragically passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Today, we honour the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix. His groundbreaking guitar work changed music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' Anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic eleventh studio album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Flashback
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That iconic cover and timeless tracks – what's your pick from their final recorded album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: American singer-songwriter Chrissie Hynde, frontwoman of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! The Pretenders icon continues to command the stage. What's your favourite song by her?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: English singer and songwriter Liam Gallagher, former frontman of Oasis and Beady Eye, was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Liam Gallagher
angles.copy: Our kid turns 54 today! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Oasis or solo track from him?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' Anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's seminal album 'Imagine' was released on October 8, 1971, in the UK, featuring the iconic title track.

angles.name: Imagine Day
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A song that continues to inspire hope and peace around the world.

events.title: Anniversary of the First iPod Launch
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music and putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: iPod's Big Day
angles.copy: Remember when the first iPod dropped? Twenty-five years ago, Apple changed how we listened to music forever. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is recognised as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Happy James Bond Day
angles.copy: Shaken, not stirred! It's James Bond Day, celebrating 64 years since 'Dr. No' first hit screens. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the best theme tune?
